name: legacy-modernizer
description: Agentic tool to convert legacy .NET applications to Java Spring Boot APIs and React/Angular SPAs with human-in-the-loop gates, OpenShift CI/CD, unit test generation, and Jira/Bitbucket MCP integration.

commands.title: Modernizer: Step 2 - Generate Legacy Documentation (requires Step 1 Analyze)
Modernizer: Step 3 - Review Documentation [HUMAN GATE] (requires Step 2)
Modernizer: Step 4 - Convert .NET API to Spring Boot (requires Step 3 approval)
Modernizer: Step 5 - Convert ASP.NET WebForms to SPA (requires Step 3 approval)
Modernizer: Step 6 - Review Generated Code [HUMAN GATE] (requires Steps 4 and 5)
Modernizer: Step 7 - Generate Unit & Integration Tests (requires Step 6 approval)
Modernizer: Step 8 - Generate OpenShift CI/CD Manifests (requires Step 7)
Modernizer: Step 9 - Review CI/CD Manifests [HUMAN GATE] (requires Step 8)
Modernizer: Resolve Defect & Open Bitbucket PR (MCP)
Modernizer: Configure Target Architecture & Best Practices

enumDescriptions: Use models available through your GitHub Copilot subscription via VS Code's Language Model API (cheapest for high-volume agent runs).
Call Anthropic's Claude API directly with your own key.
Call OpenAI's API directly with your own key.
modernizer.modelProvider.description: Which LLM to use for agentic conversion.

modernizer.copilotModelFamily.description: Copilot model family to request via vscode.lm (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, claude-sonnet-4.5, o1). Run 'Modernizer: List Available Copilot Models' to see what's installed.

modernizer.modelFor.description: Optional per-step model overrides. Keys are step IDs (analyze, docs, convertApi, convertUi, tests, cicd, defectResolution). Values are '<provider>:<model>' such as 'copilot:gpt-4o-mini' or 'anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6'.

modernizer.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model ID to use when modelProvider is claude-sonnet.

modernizer.anthropicMaxTokens.description: max_tokens sent to Anthropic per request. Keep this high for multi-file code generation quality; throttling should come from delays/backoff.

modernizer.anthropicRetryAttempts.description: How many times to retry Anthropic requests on 429/529 before failing.

modernizer.anthropicRetryBaseMs.description: Base backoff (ms) for Anthropic retry delay when retry-after is unavailable.

modernizer.openaiModel.description: OpenAI model ID to use when modelProvider is openai-codex.

modernizer.legacyRoot.description: Absolute path to the legacy .NET codebase.

modernizer.targetRoot.description: Absolute path where modernized output is written.

modernizer.targetArchitectureFile.description: Path to a markdown file describing target architecture & best practices.

modernizer.historyTurns.description: How many recent tool-use turns to retain in the LLM prompt window.

modernizer.toolResultMaxChars.description: Maximum characters from each tool result to include in model context.

modernizer.skillPromptMaxChars.description: Maximum SKILL.md characters injected into the system prompt.

modernizer.archPromptMaxChars.description: Maximum target architecture markdown characters injected into the system prompt.

modernizer.readFileDefaultMaxBytes.description: Default byte budget for read_file when max_bytes is not requested.

modernizer.readFileHardMaxBytes.description: Absolute cap for read_file max_bytes regardless of agent request.

modernizer.interRequestDelayMs.description: Optional delay between model requests. Use 1000-3000 to reduce rate-limit spikes.

modernizer.enableCritiquePass.description: Run a post-generation critique pass after each writing step. Disable during cost-sensitive debugging to reduce model calls.
